columns.extraction_plan: The NCT identifier is reported on page 2, in the "Patients and methods" section, under the sentence "The trial is registered with ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT00104715)."
The PubMed ID is not reported in the PDF. A DOI is provided, but not a PubMed ID.
The trial name is explicitly stated in the title of the article on page 1.
The author list is provided on page 1, at the beginning of the article.
The publication year is indicated at the top of page 1 as "EUROPEAN UROLOGY 70 (2016)256-262".
The document is a multi-page article with detailed methods, results, discussion, and references, indicating it is a full publication.

The phase is mentioned in the title of the article on page 1 as "Randomized Phase 3 GETUG-AFU15 Trial". It is also stated in the "Design, setting, and participants" section of the abstract on page 1 as "Randomized phase 3 trial".

The title of the article on page 1 includes "Long-term Survival Analysis". The abstract on page 1 states the objective is "to update overall survival (OS) data of the GETUG-AFU15 study." The introduction on page 2 also mentions "updated survival analyses. We present long-term outcomes...".
